---

One of the three Cappadocian Fathers. Known as "the Theologian" for his eloquent orations on the Trinity.

## References in Commentary

- `source.html#edge-cases-p5` — With St. Basil, devoted to Scripture for thirteen years
  text: "Gregory the Theologian, fleeing to the solitude of a monastery"
